mapper.insert: insert into resource (rid, cid, tid, rname, rfilename, roriginalname, rsize, rdate, rlink, rtype, fid) values (#{rid}, #{cid}, #{tid}, #{rname}, #{rfilename}, #{roriginalname}, #{rsize}, #{rdate}, #{rlink}, #{rtype}, #{fid})
mapper.select: select rid, cid, tid, rname, rfilename, roriginalname, rsize, rdate, rlink, rtype, fid from resource where rid = #{rid}
select tid from course where cid = #{cid}
mapper.update: update resource set fid = #{fid} where rid = #{rid}
update resource set rname = #{rname}, roriginalname = #{rname} where rid = #{rid}
update resource set rsort = #{rsort} where rid = #{rid}
